name: §fPrecursor Drone
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Sea Creature Chance: §3+10%
§7Mining Fortune: §6+30
§7Foraging Fortune: §6+30

§6Contraband
§7Catching a §3Sea Creature §7has a §a10%
§7chance to also give you §6Treasure§7.

§6Grungle
§7You can now ONLY throw your
§7Foraging Axe, but it has §cno throwing
§cpenalty §7anymore.

§6Mining Off Camera
§7While mining, each collection
§7progress grants a §a0.005% §7chance to
§7drop a random enchanted mining item.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§f§lCOMMON
